title: Architecture Explorer Config
description: Schema for agents/configs/explorer/<task_type>.json files consumed by agents/builders/architecture-explorer.md

task_type.description: Namespaced id, e.g. compliance-sre, analysis-spof, peer-review-STRUCT (lowercased), handoff-component, architecture-question, adr-application.

downstream_agent.description: subagent_type that will consume the EXPLORE_RESULT, or 'main' if the orchestrator's main session consumes it directly.

required_sections.description: Files always marked relevant regardless of keyword score. False-negative safeguard. MUST list every file the downstream agent absolutely cannot operate without.

file.description: Repo-relative path (may include glob patterns like docs/components/**/*.md).

anchor_hint.description: Optional heading hint for matched_sections reporting.

optional_sections.description: Files scored against relevance_keywords. Included in relevant_files[] only if score >= score_threshold (or anchor_hint matches a heading).

anchor_hints.description: Headings whose presence boosts the score by +0.20.

candidate_files.description: Glob patterns expanded relative to project_root. The universe of files the explorer scans.

must.description: Reserved for future use — if any 'must' term is absent, file is irrelevant. Currently informational only.

negative.description: Terms that, if dominant, push the file to irrelevant_files[].

absent_pattern.description: Regex (POSIX). Gap is emitted when pattern is NOT found in the file.

present_pattern.description: Regex (POSIX). Gap is emitted when pattern IS found (anti-pattern detection).

case_insensitive.description: When true, regex is compiled with the 'i' flag. Mirrors agents/configs/<contract>.json data_points convention.

score_threshold.description: Default 0.30. Lower values err toward inclusion (recommended).

max_irrelevant_files.description: Optional cap on irrelevant_files[] length to keep result block compact. Null = no cap.

output_format.description: EXPLORE_RESULT schema version this config targets.

notes.description: Free-form authoring notes — not used at runtime.
